'''Darian Gli''' was a [[Markul]] member of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] court who was secretly in league with [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]]. He helped [[Beshka University]] professors [[Ra Yasht]] and [[Skarten]] get an interview with Jabba's cook, [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]], which they turned into the book ''[[Torture Observed: An Interview with Jabba's Cook]]''. For this offense, Jabba consumed him. [[Melvosh Bloor]] had set up a meeting between himself and Gli, only to find out later that Gli was already dead.

{{Char-stub}}
